title: Inject procedure steering into all Tactus agents
description: Runtime exposes procedure steering retrieval and injects new steering notes centrally before each AgentPrimitive LLM invocation using per-agent State watermarks.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented steering retrieval via ProcedureChatRecorder/MCP execute_tactus alias and central AgentPrimitive injection with per-agent State watermarks. Removed optimizer mailbox polling. Verification: focused Python/MCP/runtime pytest suite passed; py_compile passed.
